title: Software Engineer (SalesForce)
description:
Job Description

We are seeking a Junior Developer to join our team. The role involves developing and customizing Salesforce applications, working with Agile methodologies, and supporting web development initiatives. You will gain hands-on experience in Salesforce technologies and DevOps practices while contributing to business solutions.

Responsibilities

  • Perform Salesforce application development using Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and declarative tools like Flows.
  • Deliver solutions using Agile methodologies, especially Scrum.
  • Work with Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Flow Builder to design and implement business solutions.
  • Develop using OmniStudio, OmniScripts, or Public Sector Solutions where required.
  • Implement and support CI/CD pipelines, DevOps tools (e.g., Jenkins, Git), and version control systems.
  • Apply knowledge of Salesforce architecture, security model, sharing rules, and governor limits.
  • Build and maintain web solutions using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
  • Perform manual test cases to ensure functionality and usability meet business requirements.

Skills and Qualifications

Experience

  • Degree in Software Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • 1–2 years of hands-on experience in software development.

Certifications (Advantageous)

  • Salesforce Certified Administrator
  • Salesforce Certified Platform App Builder
  • Salesforce Certified Platform Developer I

Technical Skills

  • Basic knowledge of Salesforce application development using Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and declarative tools like Flows.
  • Experience delivering solutions using Agile methodologies, especially Scrum.
  • Knowledge of Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Flow Builder.
  • Experience with web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
  • Knowledge of OmniStudio, OmniScripts, or Public Sector Solutions.
  • Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps tools (e.g., Jenkins, Git), and version control systems.
  • Understanding of Salesforce architecture, security model, sharing rules, and governor limits.
  • Perform manual test cases for web, ensuring functionality and usability meet the business requirements.

New to Salesforce? Individuals without prior Salesforce knowledge but have a strong foundation in programming and a willingness to learn are also welcome to apply. We provide training and support to help you succeed and grow in your career with us.

postedCompany.description:
Company Overview

Ufinity provides the industry’s most innovative and integrated business Information Technology (IT) systems for Asia’s leading enterprises, including large multinational groups, education institutions and government ministries and agencies.  We continue to be the driver of innovative solutions, delivering many industry’s firsts with exceptional value.

Incorporated in 2001, Ufinity Pte Ltd is a highly successful IT solutions engineering company which specializes in the implementation of enterprise software and services.

Our solution strategies provides our customers unmatched benefits from leading standard software and systems, including excellent system availability, scalability, process efficiency and powerful performance.
